# ASO Studio

> Self-hosted indie iOS App Store toolkit — keyword tracking, screenshot generation, and PPO experiments. Open source, AI-friendly. Pairs with Claude Code via MCP servers.

## Features

- [README](https://github.com/dsm5e/aso-tracker#readme): What ASO Studio is and what it does
- [Full LLM context](llms-full.txt): Architecture, file map, state schema, recipes for AI agents

## Sub-tools

- **Keywords**: per-keyword, per-locale rank tracking via iTunes Search API
- **Screenshots**: App Store screenshot generator with AI hero (fal.ai gpt-image-2)
- **PPO**: multi-strategy A/B treatment generator for App Store Product Page Optimization

## Stack

- React 19 + Vite + TypeScript (frontend)
- Express + better-sqlite3 + Sharp (backend)
- fal.ai for image gen, OpenAI for translation, public iTunes API for ranks

MIT.
